---
title: "HUNTER Data Analysis Pipeline"
description: "RStudio and Quarto workflow for HUNTER terminal-enrichment experiments."
---

The HUNTER data analysis pipeline provides scripts and reproducible Quarto reports for initial processing and analysis of HUNTER experiments.

The workflow is based on the TermineR approach, with modifications for terminally enriched samples. It includes reports for labeling efficiency, exploratory analysis, and inferential analysis after FragPipe-DIA and DIA-NN quantitation.

## Highlights

- Quarto reports designed for exploratory and inferential analysis.
- Workflows for N-terminally enriched data.
- Support for feature filtering, imputation, `limma` analysis, and annotation.
- Zenodo DOI: [10.5281/zenodo.15410796](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.15410796).

## Links

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/MiguelCos/HUNTER_data_analysis_pipeline)

:::{.tags}
[`Quarto`]{.tag} [`DIA`]{.tag} [`terminomics`]{.tag} [`HUNTER`]{.tag}
:::
